zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Johane Fogge of Repton於1469年出生在英國德比夏爾雷普頓時，她的父親John Fogge52歲，母親Alice Haute25歲。她於大約1488年與Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton在英國德比夏爾雷普頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1506年11月9日在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓享年37歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Johane Fogge of Repton于1469年出生在英国德比夏爾雷普頓时，她的父亲John Fogge52岁，母亲Alice Haute25岁。她于大约1488年与Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton在英国德比夏爾雷普頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1506年11月9日在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓享年37岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Fogge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hogg
meanings: English (northern England and Scotland): nickname for a swineherd or shepherd, from Middle English hog(ge) (Old English hogg) denoting either a pig, especially a castrated one, or a young sheep before its first shearing (the latter sense is most likely in northern England).
German (Högg): topographic name, a variant of Heck 1, found chiefly in Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Repton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Repton (Derbys), which is recorded as Rependon in 1197 and appears as Repington as late as the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Johane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Johane Fogge of Repton was born in 1469, in Repton, Derbyshire, England, her father, John Fogge, was 52 and her mother, Alice Haute, was 25. She married Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton about 1488, in Repton, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 9 November 1506, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Johane Fogge of Repton est née en 1469, à Repton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John Fogge, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Alice Haute, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton environ 1488, à Repton, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 novembre 1506, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Towcester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Johane Fogge of Repton 1469 in Repton, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Fogge 52 und ihre Mutter Alice Haute 25. Sie hat um 1488 in Repton, Derbyshire, England Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. November 1506 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Johane Fogge of Repton è nata il nel 1469 nel Repton, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, John Fogge, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Alice Haute, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton circa 1488, nel Repton, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1506, nel Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Towcester, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.Green's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレエン'ス ノートン
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Johane Fogge of Reptonが1469年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアレプトンで生まれた時，父John Foggeは52歳，母Alice Hauteは25歳であった。約1488年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアレプトンでSir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1506年11月9日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンで37歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Johane Fogge of Repton(이)가 1469년 영국 더비실르 레프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Fogge(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Haute(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1488년 영국 더비실르 레프턴에서 Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1506년 11월 9일 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Johane Fogge of Repton nasceu em 1469, em Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fogge, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Alice Haute, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton aproximadamente 1488, em Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1506, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Johane Fogge of Repton родилась в 1469 г. в местности рептон, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Fogge было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Haute, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton около 1488 г. в местности рептон, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 ноября 1506 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Johane Fogge of Repton nació en 1469, en Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fogge, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Alice Haute, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton aproximadamente 1488, en Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1506, en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
